text: AI systems can make decisions about our lives, from job applications to loan approvals. However, these systems can have serious ethical problems. One major issue is bias. If an AI is trained on data that contains human prejudices, it may make unfair decisions against certain groups. This threatens the principle of fairness. Another concern is privacy. AI often needs large amounts of personal data, which can be misused. To build trust, companies must ensure transparency by explaining how their AI makes choices. Overall, responsible AI development requires addressing these challenges to create systems that are both helpful and respectful of human values.
